description: A specification document on the Desktop at '/home/ga/Desktop/building_hda_spec.txt' describes requirements for a procedural building generator Houdini Digital Asset (HDA). Read the specification, then create an HDA that meets all requirements. The HDA should be saved to '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/hda/procedural_building.hda'. Create a test scene that instances the HDA with at least 3 different parameter variations and save it as '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/building_test.hipnc'.
